CREATE TABLE key_instances (id INT PRIMARY KEY, key_data VARCHAR(255), parent_key_id INT);
INSERT INTO key_instances (id, key_data, parent_key_id) VALUES (1, 'myAES', NULL);
INSERT INTO key_instances (id, key_data, parent_key_id) VALUES (2, 'rsa-test', 1);
INSERT INTO key_instances (id, key_data, parent_key_id) VALUES (3, 'yourRSA', 1);
SELECT keyi FROM (SELECT xenc_key_inst_create(key_data) AS keyi FROM key_instances WHERE parent_key_id IS NULL) AS subquery;
SELECT ki1.key_data, ki2.key_data FROM key_instances ki1 JOIN key_instances ki2 ON ki1.id = ki2.parent_key_id WHERE ki1.key_data = 'myAES';

SELECT xenc_key_inst_create(myAES_key), xenc_key_inst_create(rsa-test_key) FROM (SELECT key_data AS myAES_key FROM key_instances WHERE id = 1) AS sub1, (SELECT key_data AS rsa-test_key FROM key_instances WHERE id = 2) AS sub2;
SELECT DISTINCT ki1.key_data FROM key_instances ki1 WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM key_instances ki2 WHERE ki2.parent_key_id = ki1.id);
SELECT * FROM key_instances WHERE key_data LIKE 'my%';
SELECT xenc_key_inst_create(key_data) AS encrypted_key FROM key_instances WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM key_instances WHERE parent_key_id IS NOT NULL);
